nodes.label: pint.nvim
nodes.description: Neovim plugin providing focused UI components: dashboard, notifier, statuscolumn, indent guides, and LSP reference highlighting.

nodes.label: pint.setup
nodes.description: Configures and enables the plugin's modules by merging user options with defaults and calling each module's setup function.

nodes.label: dashboard.open
nodes.description: Opens the dashboard UI in a buffer with header, keys, recent files, and custom sections.

nodes.label: notifier.notify
nodes.description: Shows a notification matching vim.notify() signature with support for id-based replacement and history recording.

nodes.label: notifier.show_history
nodes.description: Displays notification history in a floating window with formatted timestamps and message levels.

nodes.label: statuscolumn.get
nodes.description: Renders the statuscolumn for the current window, managing sign placement and fold indicators.

nodes.label: indent.textobject
nodes.description: Selects or operates on the current indent scope with optional outer variant for ii/ai bindings.

nodes.label: indent.jump
nodes.description: Jumps to the top or bottom edge of the current indent scope for [i/]i navigation.

nodes.label: words.jump
nodes.description: Jumps to the next or previous reference of the symbol under the cursor with optional wrapping.

nodes.label: words.enable
nodes.description: Enables reference highlighting and triggers an immediate highlight refresh.

nodes.label: words.disable
nodes.description: Disables reference highlighting and clears existing highlights from the current buffer.

nodes.label: :Pint
nodes.description: User command that dispatches to dashboard, history, words-enable, and words-disable subcommands.

nodes.label: pint.Config
nodes.description: Plugin configuration class with optional config tables for each module, allowing false to disable.

nodes.label: dashboard.Config
nodes.description: Dashboard configuration with header, keys, recent files settings, custom sections, and autostart option.

nodes.label: dashboard.Key
nodes.description: Keyed action entry with icon, key binding, description, action, and optional enable/hide conditions.

nodes.label: dashboard.Section
nodes.description: Dashboard section with title, icon, items generator function, gap, padding, and enable conditions.

nodes.label: notifier.Config
nodes.description: Notifier configuration with timeout, margin, border, stacking direction, and max history entries.

nodes.label: statuscolumn.Config
nodes.description: Statuscolumn configuration with fold markers, git sign patterns, and highlight options.

nodes.label: indent.Config
nodes.description: Indent configuration with guide character, highlight groups, scope highlighting, textobject binding, and file type exclusions.

nodes.label: words.Config
nodes.description: Words configuration with debounce time for cursor rest before highlighting and enabled state.

nodes.label: mini.test
nodes.description: Testing framework used for running pint.nvim test suite with structured test sets.

nodes.label: test_setup_set
nodes.description: Test group validating pint.setup() default behavior, module disabling, and option merging.

nodes.label: test_notifier_set
nodes.description: Test group for notifier module including vim.notify replacement and history display.

nodes.label: test_statuscolumn_set
nodes.description: Test group for statuscolumn setup and expression installation.

nodes.label: test_dashboard_set
nodes.description: Test group for dashboard rendering with header, recent files, and configuration handling.

nodes.label: dashboard.recent_files
nodes.description: Collects recent files from vim.v.oldfiles with optional cwd filtering and custom file filter.

nodes.label: dashboard.format_path
nodes.description: Formats file paths into display-width-truncated segments with directory and filename highlighting.

nodes.label: dashboard.file_icon
nodes.description: Resolves file icon and highlight using mini.icons, nvim-web-devicons, or filetype fallback.

nodes.label: notifier.Item
nodes.description: Active notification item with id, message, level, title, icon, timestamps, and window/buffer state.

nodes.label: vim.notify
nodes.description: Standard Neovim notification API, replaced by pint.notifier.notify during setup.

nodes.label: README.md
nodes.description: Project documentation covering features, requirements, installation, configuration, and usage examples.

nodes.label: pint module defaults
nodes.description: Each module (dashboard, notifier, statuscolumn, indent, words) has a defaults table merged with user config.
